home.heroHeadline: Managing your family shouldn't feel like a second job.
home.heroSub: Eazy.Family brings all your calendars, shopping lists, messages, and activities into one private space — so your family spends less time managing and more time together.
home.f1d: Your family's data stays yours — always
home.f2d: Everyone stays in sync, without the back and forth chaos
home.f3d: Find things your kids will actually love doing
home.f4d: Connect with parents who get it
home.f5d: Your personal AI helper with voice-activated features to manage your family life hands-free.
home.f6d: One private space. No ads. No strangers.
home.s1b: Sign up and set up your family profile in under a minute.
home.s2b: Share a link or code — family members join instantly.
home.s3b: Manage calendars, lists, events and messages together.
home.downloadSub: Use the web app now — native iOS and Android apps are coming soon with the same seamless sync.

about.heroHeadline: We built the app we couldn't find.
about.heroSub: One was on Google Calendar, the other on Apple, one shopping list in a note app we copy/pasted into chats. And you come home with bananas to see they already bought bananas! Eazy.Family started as a fix for our own family — and became something we think every family deserves.
about.v1b: Built around your family, not around ads
about.v2b:
We never sell your data.
Your family's info is encrypted — only accessible to you.
about.v3b: Shaped by real parents, not tech companies
about.storyP1: Family life is beautiful. The days are long but the years are short — and we were spending too much of it switching between apps, missing events, and losing track of what matters. We built Eazy.Family to fix that. One private, calm space that handles the organising so you don't have to.
about.storyP2: Our goal was simple: one place, that's private and secure, helps you create lasting memories for your family and makes your daily life easier.

events.heroSub: Eazy.Family organizes real-world, age-appropriate, events designed to bring your family and friends together — music, arts, storytelling, outdoor adventures, and more.
events.e1d: Interactive sessions for babies and toddlers, concerts for young children.
events.e2d: Creative workshops designed to spark imagination at every age.
events.e3d: Live reading sessions and theatrical stories for the little ones.
events.e4d: Guided nature walks, scavenger hunts and outdoor play.
events.comingSoonSub: Create a free account to know when events are coming to your area.

download.heroSub: Web app available now. iOS and Android coming soon.
download.featuresTitle: Everything's available on web right now
download.notifyTitle: Get notified when the apps launch
download.notifySub: Create a free account and we'll email you when iOS and Android apps are ready.
download.wf6: Install as PWA from your browser

resources.heroSub: Everything you need to get the most out of Eazy.Family.
resources.gs1b: Sign up in under a minute — no credit card needed.
resources.gs2b: Add a family name and invite members with a simple link or code.
resources.gs3b: Add events to the shared calendar, create to-do lists, and message together.
resources.a1: Yes — the core features are completely free. We may introduce optional premium features in the future.
resources.q2: How do I invite my family?
resources.a2: After creating your account, go to Family Settings and share your unique invite link or code. Members join instantly.
resources.a3: Absolutely. Your data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We never sell your data or share it with third parties.
resources.q4: What devices does Eazy.Family work on?
resources.a4: Eazy.Family works in any modern web browser. Native iOS and Android apps are coming soon.
resources.q5: Can I use it in my language?
resources.a5: Yes — we support English, German, French, and Italian, with more languages on the way.
resources.q6: How do I delete my account?
resources.a6: You can delete your account at any time from the Settings page inside the app. All your data will be removed.
resources.commission: Eazy.Family may earn a small commission from qualifying Amazon purchases at no extra cost to you. We only recommend things we'd genuinely use.
resources.faq1a: Eazy.Family offers a free tier with core features — shared calendar, lists, and family messaging. Premium plans unlock AI assistance, advanced privacy controls, and unlimited storage. No ads on any plan.
resources.faq2q: Does Eazy.Family work in multiple languages?
resources.faq2a: Yes. Eazy.Family supports English, German, French, and Italian — making it especially well-suited to multilingual families across Switzerland, France, Germany, Italy, and the UK.
resources.faq3q: How is Eazy.Family different from a WhatsApp group?
resources.faq3a: A WhatsApp group is a messaging thread. Eazy.Family is a full family hub: shared calendar, real-time lists, private messaging, AI assistance, and event planning — all in one place, with no ads and strong privacy controls.
resources.faq4a: Absolutely. Eazy.Family is designed to be private by default. Your family's calendar, messages, and lists are never used for advertising or shared with third parties. Privacy is a core design principle, not a premium add-on.
